content: Current SLSA v1.2 provenance uses the stable predicateType https://slsa.dev/provenance/v1 and records subject digests, build definition, external parameters, resolved dependencies, builder identity, and run details so consumers can verify origin and rebuild. Sigstore supports keyless OIDC identities and verifiable transparency-backed signatures, but MNF should use the narrowest mechanism that directly attests the exact release artifacts and identity rather than invent a custom signing format.
